mapper.sql: cwi.合同条目编号, cwi.合同危废明细编号, cwi.报价危废明细编号, cwi.危废条目编号, hwi.废物代码, cwi.废物名称, cwi.废物形态, cwi.计划转移数量, cwi.计量单位, cwi.是否启用辅助核算, cwi.辅助计量单位, cwi.辅助单位每基础单位数量, cwi.辅助数量, cwi.辅助单价, cwi.单价, cwi.金额, cwi.付款方, cwi.计价方案, cwi.低价备注
FROM CONTRACT_WASTE_ITEM cwi LEFT JOIN HAZARDOUS_WASTE_ITEM hwi ON cwi.危废条目编号 = hwi.条目编号 LEFT JOIN HAZARDOUS_WASTE_CATEGORY hwc ON hwi.废物类别编号 = hwc.废物类别编号

result.column: 甲方统一社会信用代码
乙方统一社会信用代码

mapper.sql: SELECT c.合同编号, c.合同号, c.客户编码, c.customer_snapshot, c.甲方名称, c.甲方联系人, c.甲方联系电话, c.甲方统一社会信用代码, c.乙方名称, c.乙方联系人, c.乙方联系电话, c.乙方统一社会信用代码, c.合同金额, c.业务费用结算, c.签订时间, c.合同状态, c.合同有效期开始, c.合同有效期结束, c.编号生成方式, c.审核人编码, c.审核时间, c.寄件日期, c.收件日期, c.合同扫描件文件编号, c.合同PDF文件编号, c.扫描件路径, c.审核意见, c.创建人编码, c.创建时间, c.更新时间, c.备注 FROM CONTRACT c

if.test: enterpriseName != null and enterpriseName != '' and enterpriseName.trim() != ''

where.if: AND ( -- 搜索正式客户的名称和联系人 EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM CUSTOMER cu WHERE cu.客户编码 = c.客户编码 AND ( cu.企业名称 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{enterpriseName}, '%') OR cu.联系人 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{enterpriseName}, '%') ) ) -- 搜索临时客户的名称和联系人（从customer_snapshot中提取） OR ( JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(c.customer_snapshot, '$.customerType')) = 'TEMPORARY' AND ( JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(c.customer_snapshot, '$.customerName')) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{enterpriseName}, '%') OR JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(c.customer_snapshot, '$.contactPerson')) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{enterpriseName}, '%') ) ) )

if.test: contractStatus != null and contractStatus != '' and contractStatus.trim() != ''

choose.when: AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM FILE f WHERE f.关联业务类型 = 'CONTRACT' AND f.关联业务ID = c.合同编号 AND f.文件状态 = '正常' )
choose.otherwise: AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM FILE f WHERE f.关联业务类型 = 'CONTRACT' AND f.关联业务ID = c.合同编号 AND f.文件状态 = '正常' )

choose.when:
ORDER BY
c.合同编号
(SELECT cu.企业名称 FROM CUSTOMER cu WHERE cu.客户编码 = c.客户编码)
c.合同金额 c.签订时间 c.合同状态 c.合同有效期结束 c.更新时间
ASC DESC DESC
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY c.更新时间 DESC, c.合同编号 DESC

mapper.select: SELECT c.合同编号, c.合同号, c.客户编码, c.customer_snapshot, c.合同金额, c.业务费用结算, c.签订时间, c.合同状态, c.合同有效期开始, c.合同有效期结束, c.编号生成方式, c.审核人编码, c.审核时间, c.寄件日期, c.收件日期, c.合同扫描件文件编号, c.合同PDF文件编号, c.扫描件路径, c.创建人编码, c.创建时间, c.更新时间, c.备注 FROM CONTRACT c WHERE c.客户编码 = #{customerId} ORDER BY c.创建时间 DESC
SELECT c.合同编号, c.合同金额, c.customer_snapshot, c.创建时间 FROM CONTRACT c WHERE c.创建时间 >= #{startTime} AND c.创建时间 <= #{endTime}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM PICKUP_NOTICE pn INNER JOIN CONTRACT c ON pn.合同号 = c.合同号 WHERE c.合同编号 = #{contractId}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM WAREHOUSING w INNER JOIN DISPATCH_ORDER do1 ON w.收运运输单号 = do1.运输单号 INNER JOIN PICKUP_NOTICE pn ON do1.收运通知单号 = pn.收运通知单号 INNER JOIN CONTRACT c ON pn.合同号 = c.合同号 WHERE c.合同编号 = #{contractId} AND w.审核时间 IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM SETTLEMENT WHERE 合同编号 = #{contractId} AND 状态 IN ('已收款')
SELECT MIN(pn.创建时间) FROM PICKUP_NOTICE pn INNER JOIN CONTRACT c ON pn.合同号 = c.合同号 WHERE c.合同编号 = #{contractId}

SELECT MIN(w.入库时间) FROM WAREHOUSING w INNER JOIN DISPATCH_ORDER do1 ON w.收运运输单号 = do1.运输单号 INNER JOIN PICKUP_NOTICE pn ON do1.收运通知单号 = pn.收运通知单号 INNER JOIN CONTRACT c ON pn.合同号 = c.合同号 WHERE c.合同编号 = #{contractId} AND w.审核时间 IS NOT NULL
SELECT MIN(审核时间) FROM SETTLEMENT WHERE 合同编号 = #{contractId} AND 状态 IN ('已收款')

SELECT oss.价外费用编号 as outOfScopeServiceId, oss.项目 as project, oss.规格型号 as spec, oss.单位 as unit, oss.计划数量 as plannedQuantity, oss.合同单价 as contractUnitPrice, oss.状态 as status FROM OUT_OF_SCOPE_SERVICE oss WHERE oss.关联业务类型 = 'CONTRACT' AND oss.关联业务单号 = #{contractId} ORDER BY oss.价外费用编号 ASC

SELECT cwi.合同条目编号 as contractItemId, cwi.合同危废明细编号 as contractWasteItemId, cwi.报价危废明细编号 as quotationWasteItemId, cwi.危废条目编号 as hazardousWasteItemId, hwi.废物代码 as wasteCode, cwi.废物名称 as wasteName, cwi.废物形态 as wasteForm, hwc.废物类别 as wasteCategory, cwi.计划转移数量 as plannedQuantity, cwi.计量单位 as unit, cwi.是否启用辅助核算 as enableAuxiliaryAccounting, cwi.辅助计量单位 as auxiliaryUnit, cwi.辅助单位每基础单位数量 as auxiliaryPerBasicUnit, cwi.辅助数量 as auxiliaryQuantity, cwi.辅助单价 as auxiliaryUnitPrice, cwi.单价 as unitPrice, cwi.金额 as amount, cwi.付款方 as payer, cwi.计价方案 as pricingPlan, cwi.低价备注 as lowPriceRemark FROM CONTRACT_WASTE_ITEM cwi LEFT JOIN HAZARDOUS_WASTE_ITEM hwi ON cwi.危废条目编号 = hwi.条目编号 LEFT JOIN HAZARDOUS_WASTE_CATEGORY hwc ON hwi.废物类别编号 = hwc.废物类别编号 WHERE cwi.合同条目编号 = #{contractItemId} ORDER BY cwi.合同危废明细编号 ASC

SELECT c.`合同编号`, c.`合同号`, c.`客户编码`, c.`customer_snapshot`, c.`甲方名称`, c.`甲方联系人`, c.`甲方联系电话`, c.`甲方统一社会信用代码`, c.`乙方名称`, c.`乙方联系人`, c.`乙方联系电话`, c.`乙方统一社会信用代码`, c.`合同金额`, c.`签订时间`, c.`合同状态`, cu.`企业名称` as customerName FROM CONTRACT c LEFT JOIN CUSTOMER cu ON c.`客户编码` = cu.`客户编码` WHERE c.`合同号` = #{contractCode}

SELECT c.合同编号 AS contractId, c.合同号 AS contractNo, c.甲方名称 AS partyAName, c.甲方联系人 AS partyAContact, c.甲方联系电话 AS partyAContactPhone, c.甲方统一社会信用代码 AS partyACreditCode, c.签订时间 AS signTime, c.合同状态 AS contractStatus, c.合同有效期开始 AS validFrom, c.合同有效期结束 AS validTo, COUNT(DISTINCT w.入库单编号) AS totalInboundCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sr.关联记录编号 IS NULL THEN w.入库单编号 ELSE NULL END) AS unlinkedInboundCount FROM CONTRACT c LEFT JOIN PICKUP_NOTICE pn ON pn.合同号 = c.合同号 LEFT JOIN DISPATCH_ORDER do1 ON do1.收运通知单号 = pn.收运通知单号 LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSING w ON w.收运运输单号 = do1.运输单号 LEFT JOIN SETTLEMENT_REFERENCE sr ON sr.关联来源单号 = w.入库单号 AND sr.关联来源类型 = 'WAREHOUSING' GROUP BY c.合同编号, c.合同号, c.甲方名称, c.甲方联系人, c.甲方联系电话, c.甲方统一社会信用代码, c.签订时间, c.合同状态, c.合同有效期开始, c.合同有效期结束 ORDER BY c.合同编号 DESC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT w.入库单编号) FROM WAREHOUSING w INNER JOIN DISPATCH_ORDER do1 ON w.收运运输单号 = do1.运输单号 INNER JOIN PICKUP_NOTICE pn ON do1.收运通知单号 = pn.收运通知单号 WHERE pn.合同号 IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM CONTRACT c WHERE c.合同号 = pn.合同号 )
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM SETTLEMENT s WHERE s.是否删除 = 0 AND s.合同编号 IS NULL

SELECT c.合同编号 AS contractId, c.合同号 AS contractNo, c.甲方名称 AS enterpriseName, c.合同状态 AS status, DATE_FORMAT(c.签订时间, '%Y-%m-%d') AS signDate FROM CONTRACT c WHERE c.合同状态 IN ('已通过', '执行中')
AND ( c.合同号 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.甲方名称 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND c.创建人编码 = #{creatorId}
ORDER BY c.合同编号 DESC LIMIT 100
